children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Secretary shall establish a demonstration program to evaluate the use of a contract care intermediary to improve the accessibility of health services to California Indians.

children.heading: Agreement with California Rural Indian Health Board
children.label: b Agreement with California Rural Indian Health Board

children.text: In establishing such program, the Secretary shall enter into an agreement with the California Rural Indian Health Board to reimburse the Board for costs (including reasonable administrative costs) incurred, during the period of the demonstration program, in providing medical treatment under contract to California Indians described in section 1679(b) of this title throughout the California contract health services delivery area described in with respect to high-cost contract care cases.1section 1680 of this titleSee References in Text note below.1
Not more than 5 percent of the amounts provided to the Board under this section for any fiscal year may be for reimbursement for administrative expenses incurred by the Board during such fiscal year.

No payment may be made for treatment provided under the demonstration program to the extent payment may be made for such treatment under the Catastrophic Health Emergency Fund described in or from amounts appropriated or otherwise made available to the California contract health service delivery area for a fiscal year.section 1621a of this title

children.heading: Advisory board
children.label: c Advisory board
children.text: There is hereby established an advisory board which shall advise the California Rural Indian Health Board in carrying out the demonstration pursuant to this section. The advisory board shall be composed of representatives, selected by the California Rural Indian Health Board, from not less than 8 tribal health programs serving California Indians covered under such demonstration, at least one half of whom are not affiliated with the California Rural Indian Health Board.

children.heading: Commencement and termination dates
children.label: d Commencement and termination dates
children.text: The demonstration program described in this section shall begin on , and shall terminate on .January 1, 1993September 30, 1997
